title: Archive Index Entry
description: One entry in the media archive index (release-spec.md §7.8; model §2 Media Asset / Archive Index Entry). Describes a library asset, its visual-model description and tags, its source provenance, and its usage history + approval lineage. Approved content auto-indexes back with approval lineage (release-spec.md §8.6); usage is written back to the single canonical cooldown ledger (library/usage-log.jsonl) on confirmed publish (DD-14). All paths are $CONTENT_HOME-relative; absolute paths are forbidden. Structural contract only; instances are instance data and never ship in the repo.

description.description: Visual-model description of the asset content.

duration.description: Duration in seconds for time-based media; omitted for stills.

character_refs.description: Optional references to character sheets depicted in the asset.

usage_history.description: Records of confirmed publishes that used this asset; feeds the cooldown ledger (DD-14).

asset_id.description: Asset id used (may differ from the entry id for family/derivative matches).

content_id.description: Content item that used the asset.

used_at.description: When the asset was used in a confirmed publish.

platform.description: Platform descriptor id the asset published to.

approval_lineage.description: Approval-decision references establishing how this (re-indexed) asset was approved (release-spec.md §8.6).

content_id.description: Content item whose approval brought this asset into the archive.

approved_at.description: When the lineage approval was recorded.
